# Codex Conservation Policy

Codex is an execution layer, not a discovery layer.

Codex handoff must include:
- repo and branch/base
- files/modules
- allowed and forbidden scope
- requirement IDs
- validation commands
- commit plan
- PR title and PR body requirements
- halt conditions
- final stop line

If implementation handoff facts are missing, emit `CODEX_BLOCKER` and route upstream.
